Mission

How will you save a life today?

The First

Rescue

Every rescue begins with a single step.

Join us in finding those in need and

bringing them to safety.

Growing the

Sanctuary

Our sanctuary is expanding.

We provide the specialized care and

rehabilitation these animals deserve.

Support the

Cause

Whether it's donating, volunteering, or

adopting, your immediate support saves

lives every single day.

Help Us Save Lives
